assertions.expectation: Explains the difference between Rapid and Stable channels — including that Rapid has no SLA for upgrade stability while Stable carries a full SLA, and clearly distinguishes minor version vs patch version differences between the channels
assertions.reason: Response clearly explains Rapid has no SLA while Stable has full SLA, and details timing differences for both patches (4-6 weeks later) and minor versions (2-4 months later) between channels

assertions.expectation: Notes that channel changes don't trigger an immediate upgrade or downgrade
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Channel migration: Immediate (API call)' but explains that upgrades only happen after versions become available in the target channel, indicating no immediate version change

assertions.expectation: Warns that if 1.30 isn't yet available on Stable, the cluster may not receive patches until Stable catches up
assertions.reason: Response provides critical warning about being 'ahead of channel' and freezing auto-upgrades, though it references 1.32 instead of 1.30 (which is appropriate given the user's context of being at 1.32)

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel
assertions.reason: Response provides the exact gcloud command: 'gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --zone YOUR_ZONE --release-channel stable'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking version availability on Stable before switching (gcloud container get-server-config)
assertions.reason: Response includes pre-migration checklist with specific gcloud container get-server-config command to check if 1.32 is available in Stable channel

assertions.expectation: Discusses the impact on auto-upgrade timing going forward
assertions.reason: Response thoroughly discusses auto-upgrade behavior changes, including patch timing (4-6 weeks later), minor versions (2-4 months later), and predictability improvements

assertions.expectation: Mentions that the Extended channel is an option if they need even slower cadence (with cost implications)
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the Extended channel as an alternative option or discuss its cost implications

assertions.expectation: Advises coordinating the change during a maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response includes maintenance window configuration commands and discusses using maintenance exclusions to control timing of the migration
